mnemonics: TIDY My Data (TMD): Think of preparing a tidy room. Tidy, Manipulate, Deal with missing values.
keyPoints: Import datasets using functions like read.csv() or read_excel() from the readr and readxl packages.
Handle missing data by identifying (is.na()), removing (na.omit()), or imputing values.
Reshape data between wide and long formats using functions like pivot_longer() and pivot_wider() from tidyr.
commonMistakes: Using the wrong separator or decimal character when importing data, leading to incorrectly parsed columns.
Ignoring or automatically deleting missing values (NAs) without first investigating the reason for their existence.
Confusing the arguments in pivot_longer() and pivot_wider(), resulting in incorrectly shaped data frames.
